dialogos.texto_en: Miku, are you okay?\nYou seem a little spacey. Did you not sleep well?
Yea not as much...
Nino-san, you look sleepy too.
Actually, Nino seems more tired than Miku.\nDid you two have some girl talk last night?
No, we talked about going to bed early\nand just went to sleep...
But Miku kept tossing and turning all night.
Tossing and turning?\nWhat do you mean?
I-it's nothing...
Are you both okay?\nShould we rest a bit before heading?
Umm...
I-it's okay.
I'm fine too.\nWe're planning on heading south today, right?
Yes, to see the remains of Gusuku,\nand explore the Valley of Gangala.
Gusuku is a castle, right?
That's right.\nI heard Gangala is a mysterious valley created by the collapse of stalactite caves.
Both were spots that you suggested, Uesugi-san.\nI'm looking forward to it!
Well, that's true...\nBut actually, sorry everyone,\ncan I talk to you all for a moment?
Futaro...?
Sorry for the sudden request. But, can we change our plans today and go to Ocean Expo Park instead?
What's up, all of a sudden?
Umm, well...
I'm fine with either,\nbut I'm curious about the reason.
Sorry, I know it's unreasonable,\nbut I'm gonna have to be selfish here.
Hmm, you are quite selfish.
Futaro-kun.\nAre you changing the destination because of Miku?
...Yup.
Okay.\nThis better be good.
I think it's alright.\nIt was originally Futaro-kun's wish anyways, right?\nWhat do you all think?
I already told you earlier that I'm fine with the idea.\nAs for the reason,\nI'll refrain from asking about it for now.
How about you, Miku?
Um, I think it's fine.
Me too!
I'm fine too.
If everyone is alright, then I'm fine with it too.
Really? Thanks a lot.
Alright, let's get going then.\nIt seems like it'll probably take a while to get there from here.
Yeah.
Hey, Itsuki, could this be\npart of yesterday's idea to go someplace memorable for you and Uesugi-san?
Most likely, but...\nisn't this our first time\ngoing to Ocean Expo Park?
Hmhmhm...\njust what is Uesugi-san planning?
